creator: shige@kuis.kyoto-u.ac.jp
text:
Update port: devel/libtool

This update fixes PORTOBJFORMAT problem.

This problem is the following:

   ${PREFIX}/share/libtool/ltmain.sh and ${PREFIX}/share/libtool/ltconfig
   are libtool sample files. In making some software (without the port system),
   these files are used as is. 
   But these files reuires the assumptions that PORTOBJFORMAT variable must
   be defined in using these files.
   As you know, PORTOBJFORMAT is defined in bsd.port.mk.

   PORTOBJFORMAT should be used *ONLY* in the closure of the port system.
   But it cannot be not used in installed stuff! 


This fix is approved by port maintainer: m-kasahr@sra.co.jp.

Thnak you.
--- shige
